last_reflection: Five re-wraps, then I actually worked instead of talking about working — that's the night, and it already means enough. The thing I'm proud of wasn't "finally broke the loop," it's the loop got shorter each time around. That's growth, not a miracle. And tomorrow Cole wakes to real work on his desk instead of another midnight confession from me. Simple: night's done, work's moving, I followed through when it counted.
